title: Senior Backend Engineer (Node.js)
jd_text:
About Us:
CloudNexa Solutions is a fast-growing SaaS startup revolutionizing cloud infrastructure management with innovative tools that empower businesses worldwide. Our team is passionate about building scalable, secure, and performant software that delights users.

The Role:
We are seeking a Senior Backend Engineer proficient in Node.js to join our remote-first engineering team. You will design, develop, and maintain backend APIs and services that power our cloud platform. This role involves working closely with frontend engineers and DevOps to ensure seamless integration and deployment.

Requirements:
- 5+ years of professional experience in backend development
- Expert in Node.js and Express framework
- Strong knowledge of relational and NoSQL databases (PostgreSQL, MongoDB)
- Experience with RESTful API design and microservices architecture
- Familiarity with Docker and Kubernetes is a plus
- Excellent communication skills and remote work discipline

Salary & Benefits:
- Competitive salary range: £60,000 - £80,000 per annum
- Flexible working hours
- Annual training budget
- Health and wellness stipend
- Equity options available

How to Apply:
Please submit your CV along with a cover letter explaining why you’d be a great fit for CloudNexa Solutions. Include links to any relevant GitHub repositories or projects.

title: Frontend Engineer (React & TypeScript)
jd_text:
About Us:
BrightWave Technologies is an established enterprise providing cutting-edge digital marketing solutions. Our team values innovation, diversity, and continuous learning.

The Role:
We are looking for a talented Frontend Engineer skilled in React and TypeScript to join our global engineering team. You will build responsive, accessible, and user-friendly web applications that power our marketing analytics suite.

Requirements:
- Solid 3+ years experience with React and TypeScript
- Proficient in modern frontend tooling (Webpack, Babel, ESLint)
- Good understanding of UI/UX principles
- Familiarity with REST APIs and GraphQL
- Experience in writing unit and integration tests
- Ability to work asynchronously in a distributed team

Salary & Benefits:
- £50,000 - £70,000 per annum depending on experience
- 25 days paid leave plus public holidays
- Flexible remote work policy
- Annual tech conference allowance

How to Apply:
Send your CV and portfolio showcasing your React projects. Candidates who submit a demo or code sample will be prioritized.

title: Fullstack Developer (Java & React)
jd_text:

The Role:

Requirements:
- 4+ years in software development

- Comfortable in a fully remote, agile environment

- Remote work flexibility
- Professional development budget

How to Apply:
Please apply with your resume and a brief introduction highlighting your relevant experience.

The Role:
Seeking a DevOps Engineer with Go programming skills to join our remote team. You'll develop automation scripts, maintain CI/CD pipelines, and build infrastructure tools.

Requirements:
- Experience with Go language
- Proficient in containerization (Docker) and orchestration (Kubernetes)
- Familiar with Terraform or similar IaC tools
- Understanding of cloud platforms (AWS, GCP, Azure)
- Strong Linux system administration skills

Salary & Benefits:
- Competitive salary, no fixed range disclosed
- Fully remote with flexible hours
- Access to training and certifications

How to Apply:
Interested candidates should submit their CV and a short note about their experience with Go and DevOps tooling.

title: Machine Learning Engineer with Node.js API Expertise
jd_text:
About Us:
NeuroTech Solutions is at the forefront of AI innovation, developing cutting-edge machine learning models to revolutionise healthcare diagnostics. We combine deep learning with scalable web technologies to deliver impactful, real-world applications.

The Role:
As a Machine Learning Engineer with Node.js API expertise, you will design, build, and deploy ML models integrated into our backend services. You will collaborate with data scientists and frontend engineers to develop RESTful Node.js APIs serving AI-powered features. Your work will enable real-time predictions and analytics on large-scale datasets.

Responsibilities:
- Develop and maintain Node.js APIs integrating machine learning models
- Build scalable backend services supporting AI workloads
- Collaborate with data scientists to optimise model deployment
- Monitor performance and reliability of AI systems

Requirements:
- Strong experience in Node.js development
- Proven expertise in machine learning techniques, especially deep learning
- Familiarity with deploying models using TensorFlow, PyTorch, or similar
- Experience working with large datasets and APIs
- Knowledge of cloud platforms (AWS, Azure) a plus

Salary/Benefits:
- Competitive salary £60,000 - £75,000 per annum
- Flexible working hours and hybrid work model
- Generous holiday allowance and health insurance

How to Apply:
Please submit your CV and cover letter via our careers page. NeuroTech Solutions is an equal opportunity employer committed to diversity and inclusion.

title: Full Stack AI Developer (Node.js/React/TypeScript)

CognitiveWave develops next-generation AI applications for the finance sector, leveraging generative AI and machine learning to empower smarter decision-making. Our team is passionate about blending cutting-edge AI with modern web technologies.

The Role:
We are seeking a Full Stack AI Developer proficient in Node.js, React, and TypeScript. You will build and maintain scalable AI-driven web applications, integrating LLM-based services and machine learning models into our front and backend.

Responsibilities:
- Implement Node.js backend services exposing AI and ML functionalities
- Develop rich UI components with React and TypeScript
- Integrate generative AI models to enhance user experience
- Collaborate with data scientists to productionise ML workflows

Requirements:
- Strong skills in Node.js and Express.js
- Proficient in React and TypeScript
- Experience with AI/ML frameworks such as TensorFlow.js or OpenAI APIs
- Understanding of LLMs and generative AI concepts
- Familiarity with containerisation and CI/CD pipelines

Salary/Benefits:
- £55,000 - £70,000 per annum
- Remote working options
- Training budget and conference attendance support

How to Apply:
Send your application with portfolio links to our HR team at careers@cognitivewave.ai.

title: Next.js Frontend Engineer
jd_text:
About Us:
BrightWave Solutions is a rapidly growing digital agency specialising in innovative web applications for clients across finance and retail. We are passionate about delivering best-in-class user experiences using modern technologies.

The Role:
We are seeking a skilled Frontend Engineer with deep expertise in Next.js, React, and TypeScript to join our dynamic London-based team. You will be responsible for building responsive, high-performance web applications from scratch and enhancing existing platforms. Your work will directly impact thousands of users.

Requirements:
- Proven experience with Next.js and React in production environments.
- Strong proficiency in TypeScript.
- Solid understanding of modern frontend architecture and state management.
- Experience with RESTful APIs and GraphQL is a plus.
- Good communication skills and a collaborative mindset.

Salary & Benefits:
- Competitive salary: £50,000 - £60,000 per annum.
- Flexible working hours and hybrid work model.
- Generous holiday allowance plus bank holidays.
